data.name: Smilers Den Deluxxx
data.detailed_description:
You have been sent to the backrooms to observe and take photo evidence of a creature known as a smiler, nicknamed "Karelia". Can you complete the tasks and end your shift alive, or will you submit to her lustful advances?

Features:

⭐ FNAF style mechanics. Meet the quota to survive the night

⭐ Complete tasks and observe Karelia on the cameras to survive.

⭐ Watch your back to make sure she doesn't sneak up on you.

⭐ 8 Different lewd scenes including bonus scenes!

Deluxxx Edition Features:

⭐ Karelia fully voiced by mommy DornVA of Shady Lewd Kart & Yu Crossing Animals fame!

⭐ Photo Gallery to collect your "research" & Replay Sex Scenes

⭐ Steam Achievments

⭐ New "Escape Karelia" Maze Minigame (Can you outrun her?)
⭐ New "Smiler Plushie" Minigame (Fill the plushie with more than stuffing!)
⭐ Find the Pages: Lewd sketches from sightings of Karelia to discover...

data.short_description: You have been sent to the backrooms to observe and take photo evidence of a creature known as a smiler, nicknamed "Karelia". Can you complete the tasks and end your shift alive, or will you submit to her lustful advances?
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10/11 (64Bit).
  • 處理器: Any Dual-Core Processor (Intel or AMD)
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Geforce MX150 / Vega 8 or better with 2GB of Graphics Memory
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Yes
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10/11 (64Bit).
  • 處理器: Any Dual-Core Processor (Intel or AMD)
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Geforce MX150 / Vega 8 or better with 2GB of Graphics Memory
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Yes
